Events

Breadcrumb

  1. home
  2. FDI World Dental Congress 2025
Share

Share this page

Please choose your sharing option below

FDI event
9 September 2025 - 12 September 2025

FDI World Dental Congress 2025

The FDI World Dental Congress in Shanghai was a resounding success, bringing together more than 30,000 participants, including delegates and exhibition visitors. The event ran smoothly, and our co-hosts, the Chinese Stomatological Association, ensured that all aspects of the collaboration were handled with great professionalism.

From the scientific and exhibition programmes to the social events, the feedback we received was overwhelmingly positive. We are grateful to our co-hosts for their efforts in making this Congress an event to remember.

The General Assembly and Parliament meetings were equally productive, with 86 countries represented at the 2025 World Dental Parliament.

Video file

Photo Gallery

Relive the best moments from the World Dental Congress in Shanghai

View Photos

What's next?

The FDI World Dental Congress 2026 is scheduled to take place in Prague, Czech Republic, from 4 to 7 September 2026. Don’t miss your chance to experience cutting-edge science, inspiring lectures, and unparalleled networking opportunities in Prague.

Visit the website

1214 Geneva
Switzerland
